scripts.build: bun run prebuild && bun run build:types && bun run build:bundle
scripts.build:bundle: bun build --target node --packages bundle --external '@mistralai/mistralai' --external '@google-cloud/storage' --external '@linear/sdk' --external '@notionhq/client' --external '@qdrant/js-client-rest' --external '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' --external '@fal-ai/client' --external '@composio/core' --external 'googleapis' --external 'stripe' --external 'twilio' --external 'posthog-node' --external 'postmark' --external 'fathom-typescript' --external '@electric-sql/pglite' --external 'drizzle-orm' --external 'drizzle-orm/*' --outfile dist/index.js src/index.ts && mkdir -p api/dist && cp dist/index.js api/dist/index.js
scripts.postinstall: if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ]; then bun run build:bundle; fi
